summary: Build 8 testing complete — all 8 backend tests pass, all 6 frontend test flows pass. Dashboard KPIs load progressively, Loanbook DPD/Score/Mora columns work, GestionModal opens with dropdown and PTP field, RADAR mobile responsive (no horizontal scroll), scheduler trigger endpoints work, WA-logs returns array, E2E gestión flow persists in CRM timeline.

issues: TEST 8E says 'Alertas Scheduler' tab but actual tab label is 'Scheduler' at /configuracion (not /settings). Minor naming discrepancy — functionally passes.

critical_code_review_comments: Settings page route is /configuracion (not /settings). The test spec referenced /settings — clarify in documentation.
trigger_job returns 404 for unknown jobs, not 400. Test spec says '400' but 404 is also acceptable and correct REST semantics.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing TEST3-LB00x entries.
mocked_apis: Alegra ERP (semáforo CFO shows N/D as expected), Mercately WhatsApp outbound (MOCKED — DNS restriction in preview)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build 8 fully tested: Dashboard progressive load OK, Loanbook Mora column + DPD/Score sort OK, RadarCards with BucketBadge/ScoreBadge/ultima_gestion OK, GestionModal canal+resultado+PTP OK, mobile RADAR (375px) no horizontal scroll, scheduler POST trigger OK, wa-logs OK, E2E gestión saved → CRM timeline shows 'WHATSAPP no contestó'. Settings/Scheduler tab at /configuracion (not /settings). All 8 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_build8.py pass.
